overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character exploring a scenic mountain lake environment. The character transitions between swimming in clear shallow water and walking along rocky shores, grassy terrain, and through dense vegetation with mountain backdrops.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow lake shore with boat mooring

events.description: character transitions from wading to swimming in deeper water
character exits water onto sandy shore

agents.ego_description: character walks into shallow water from the shore, swims briefly, then emerges onto the beach

entered.detail: small motorboat with red and white hull moored at the shore
distant mountain peaks visible across the lake
tall evergreen trees lining the distant shore
clear shallow water with visible rocky bottom
sandy and rocky beach area across the water

segments.scene_description: The character begins at the water's edge next to a moored boat, walks into the clear lake water, swims briefly, then emerges onto the opposite shore. The scene features a wide open mountain lake environment with distant peaks and evergreen trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky lakeside path with scattered vegetation

events.description: character transitions from walking to jogging along the shore

agents.ego_description: character walks and then jogs along the shoreline path with the lake visible to the right

entered.detail: patches of grass and low vegetation along the path
low shrubs growing along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the rocky shoreline path, transitioning from walking to jogging. The lake remains visible to the right while grassy terrain and scattered bushes appear on the left, with the boat now left behind.

events.description: character approaches the water's edge again after moving inland

agents.ego_description: character walks through tall grass and scattered trees, navigating around vegetation while exploring inland from the shore

entered.detail: small wooden structure visible across the water
boulders and rocky outcrops on the hillside

segments.scene_description: Moving inland through dense grass and scattered trees, the character explores the terrain with the lake periodically visible. A distant cabin appears across the water, and large rock formations emerge on the left as the character navigates the natural environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow rocky cove with clear water

events.description: character enters shallow water again at the rocky cove
character exits water onto rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: character wades through shallow clear water then climbs onto the rocky shoreline, navigating around large boulders

entered.detail: massive gray rocks scattered along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character enters the clear shallow water of a rocky cove, wades through it, then climbs onto the rocky shore. Large boulders dominate the foreground while the mountain range remains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest path leading to lakeside overlook

events.description: dense foliage temporarily obscures the camera view
character emerges from dense vegetation to open overlook with lake view

agents.ego_description: character pushes through dense bushes and trees uphill, then emerges to a vantage point overlooking the lake

entered.detail: thick bushes and low vegetation blocking the path
tall deciduous tree with white bark at the overlook

segments.scene_description: The character ascends through dense undergrowth that temporarily obscures the view, then emerges onto a grassy overlook. From this vantage point, the lake is visible again in the distance to the right, framed by trees and the mountain range.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the edge of a serene mountain lake through rugged inland terrain and up to a high grassy overlook. It begins with the character leaving a moored boat to swim across clear lake waters before emerging onto a rocky shoreline. As the character transitions from walking to jogging along the coast, the scene shifts inland through dense grass and scattered trees, where large rock formations appear and a distant cabin becomes visible across the water. The camera then follows the character as they wade through the shallow waters of a rocky cove and climb over dominant boulders. Finally, the movement leads through thick undergrowth that temporarily obscures the view before breaking open onto a wide overlook, framing the distant lake and mountain range.
